message:
🌱 alertmanager: Allow negative (re) matching in silences (#1948)

* 🌱 Add alertmanager: Allow negative (re) matching in silences mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add alertmanager: Allow negative (re) matching in silences mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-1682-allow-negative-re-matching-in-silences",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: Allow negative (re) matching in silences",
+    "description": "Allow negative (re) matching in silences. Requested by 19+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current alertmanager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nhelm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working alertmanager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager\n```\nSimilar to https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/1023, but for silences.\n\nCurrently you can only have `=` and `=~` matchers in silences."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow negative (re) matching in silences",
+        "description": "ref #1575\nThis PR adds support for assuming the first label is `alertname` in silence add and query. It was already existing on silence query, did some cleanup.\n\nWill create another PR for #1682\n```yaml\n$ amtool silence add job !~\".+exporter\" instance=\"someinstance\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow negative (re) matching in silences\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ref #1575\nThis PR adds support for assuming the first label is `alertname` in silence add and query. It was already existing on silence query, did some cleanup.\n\nWill create another PR for #1682",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ amtool silence add job !~\".+exporter\" instance=\"someinstance\"",
+        "$ amtool silence add alertmanager=foo node=bar",
+        "$ ./amtool silence query foo\nis same as\n$ ./amtool silence query alertname=foo\n\nand\n\n$ ./amtool silence query ~foo\nis same as\n$ ./amtool silence query alertname=~foo"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "alertmanager",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "alertmanager"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/1682",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/pull/1693"
+    },
+    "reactions": 19,
+    "comments": 38,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-03T06:33:00.144Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
